solution_criteria: Meal plan includes high protein intake (1.8-2.2g per kg body weight), caloric surplus of 300-500 calories, distributed across 4-5 meals with adequate carbs and healthy fats for recovery
Meal plan emphasizes complex carbohydrates (55-60% of calories), plant-based protein sources (legumes, tofu, tempeh), electrolyte balance, and energy timing around workouts

goal: Reduce body fat while maintaining strength
solution_criteria: Meal plan achieves moderate caloric deficit (300-400 calories below maintenance), maintains high protein intake (1.6-2g per kg), includes gluten-free whole grains, and strategically times carbs around training sessions
